text_blocks.text: altering their face/heel alignment. This may
be an abrupt, surprising event, or it may
slowly build up over time. It almost always is
accomplished with a markable change in
behavior on the part of the character. Some
turns become defining points in a wrestler's
career, as was the case when Hulk Hogan
turned heel after being a top face for over a
decade. Others may have no noticeable effect
on the character's status. If a character
repeatedly switches between being a face and
heel, this lessons the effect of such turns,
and may result in apathy from the audience.
Vince McMahon is a good example of having
more heel and face turns than anyone in
